dataset: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)

pi_items.verified_value: LBF_Neuro is a valid form ID format consistent with LibreHealth EHR Layout-Based Form conventions
pi_items.source: LibreHealth EHR schema inspection (layout_options table); layout_options table contains form_id field supporting string identifiers like 'LBFMetTemplate'

pi_items.verified_value: Neurology Intake is a realistic and appropriate form title for a neurology-focused visit form
pi_items.source: Medical terminology verification; consistent with clinical form naming conventions

pi_items.verified_value: Reflexes is a standard neurological examination category; appropriate for neurology intake form
pi_items.source: Medical terminology and neurological examination standards

pi_items.verified_value: Patellar Reflex (patellar tendon reflex) is a real deep tendon reflex mediated by the femoral nerve (L2-L4 spinal cord level), standard component of neurological examination
pi_items.source: Medical and neurological examination literature: Assessment of Patellar and Achilles Reflexes (Iowa State), NCBI StatPearls, Deep Tendon Reflexes documentation

pi_items.verified_value: Achilles Reflex (ankle jerk test, Achilles tendon reflex) is a real myotatic deep tendon reflex mediated by the sciatic nerve and S1 nerve root, standard component of neurological examination
pi_items.source: Medical and neurological examination literature: Achilles Reflex documentation (NCBI StatPearls), Deep Tendon Reflexes documentation

pi_items.verified_value: LibreHealth EHR is a real free and open-source electronic health records system based on OpenEMR, maintained by LibreHealthIO organization

pi_items.metadata_value: NHANES real patient data (9,375 patients) from LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr repository (setup_task.sh)
pi_items.verified_value: Data sourced from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr/master/sql/nhanes/libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz (39MB SQL dump); contains exactly 9,375 patient records from National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey
pi_items.source: Downloaded and inspected libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz; verified patient_data table contains 9,375 INSERT statements with real patient names and demographics; cross-referenced with CDC NHANES documentation

pi_items.metadata_value: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) is described as real patient data
pi_items.verified_value: NHANES is a real, ongoing survey by the CDC/NCHS (National Center for Health Statistics) that examines nationally representative samples of US population; data is public and authoritative
pi_items.source: CDC official NHANES page (cdc.gov/nchs/nhanes), Wikipedia, CMS documentation, ICPSR institutional archive

pi_items.metadata_value: LBF (Layout Based Forms) implied as task requirement
pi_items.verified_value: Layout-Based Forms (LBF) is a real feature in LibreHealth EHR for creating customizable clinical forms; layout_options table in NHANES dump contains LBF-style form definitions
pi_items.source: LibreHealth EHR schema inspection; OpenEMR/LibreHealth documentation references to 'Administer Layouts (including LBF Module)'

privileged_info_summary: This task uses real NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) patient data integrated into LibreHealth EHR. The 9,375 patients in the database represent actual survey participants from the CDC's NHANES program. The task requires creating a Neurology Intake form with neurological assessment fields (Patellar Reflex and Achilles Reflex), which are standard clinical examination procedures. All form specifications (ID: LBF_Neuro, Title: Neurology Intake, Group: Reflexes, Fields: Patellar Reflex and Achilles Reflex) are realistic and medically appropriate.
